data.title: The fifth address of an ancient whale holding 10,000 BTC has been activated after being dormant for about 14 years
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Whale Alert monitoring, another Bitcoin address of an ancient giant whale that has been dormant for 14.2 years has just been activated. The address contains 10,000 Bitcoins (1,083,897,963 US dollars). It is reported that this is the fifth Bitcoin address that has been dormant for more than 14 years to be activated today.

data.title: Warning Traders: $3.6 Billion in Options Set to Expire
data.description:
TL;DR A total of $3. 6 billion worth of Bitcoin and Ethereum options contracts are expiring today, which may trigger short-term market movements. Bitcoin’s put-to-call ratio slightly favors bearish bets at 1. 05, while Ethereum shows a more cautious stance with a 1. 25 ratio. Both cryptocurrencies are trading above their maximum pain prices, hinting at possible price. . . 
source: https://crypto-economy.com/warning-traders-3-6-billion-in-options-set-to-expire/

data.title: JuCoin launches xStocks spot trading zone, supporting 8 major assets in the first batch
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, JuCoin will officially launch the xStocks spot trading zone at 22:00 (UTC+8) on July 4, and will initially support 8 xStocks asset transactions, including: AAPLX, COINX, CRCLX, GOOGLX, HOODX, METAX, NVDAX, TSLAX. This zone is different from the traditional brokerage model, and has the advantages of "supporting 24/7 all-weather trading", "fractional stock trading lowers the entry threshold", "free transfer on the chain to improve asset liquidity", "USDT pricing to achieve borderless transactions", etc. JuCoin continues to be committed to the deep integration of traditional financial assets and Web3.

data.title: Bitcoin ancient whale controls 8 addresses with at least 80,009 BTC, and 4 wallets are not activated
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, the dormant Bitcoin whale for 14 years has at least 80,009 BTC, worth $8.69 billion. The whale controls about 8 wallets, 2 of which received 20,000 BTC on April 2, 2011, worth $15,600 at the time, and now worth $2.18 billion), when the price of BTC was $0.78. Another 6 wallets received 60,009 BTC on May 4, 2011, worth $202,000 at the time, and now worth $6.52 billion, when the price of BTC was $3.37. Today, 4 of the addresses transferred 40,000 BTC, and another 4 wallets are still dormant.

data.title: New Hyperliquid whale goes long on HYPE as expectations of a breakout return
data.description:
Hyperliquid saw a new whale open a 10X long position on HYPE. The token still hovers around $38, but is seen as potentially breaking out to a new range.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/hyperliquid-whale-goes-long-on-breakout/

data.title: The Trump family’s crypto project WLFI token transfer proposal has come into effect
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Trump family crypto project WLFI announced on the X platform that the proposal to make WLFI tokens transferable is now effective. "Today is the Independence Day of the United States, and we are making history."

data.description:
PIVX Weekly Pulse (June 27th, 2025 — July 3rd, 2025)Your weekly PIVX digest is here, packed with top market trends and important community updates. Market PulseMasternode Count: After hitting a new all-time high of 2,126, the number of active masternodes on the PIVX network has dropped to 1,991 this week. The decrease in masternode count may be attributed to a few key reasons. Some nodes could have temporarily disconnected, or perhaps operators are cashing in on recent price action
source: https://medium.com/pivx/pivx-weekly-pulse-june-27th-2025-july-3rd-2025-d118ef4c2bec?source=rss----430d9242e45e---4

data.title: Trump's Digital Asset Policies Gain Strong Support Among Crypto Investors
data.description: According to Odaily, a market survey conducted by research firm HarrisX reveals that cryptocurrency investors largely approve of U.S. President Donald Trump's digital asset policies. The survey indicates that 81% of respondents are familiar with Trump's policies on digital assets, and 73% express approval. These figures represent the highest support rates among the topics surveyed. Trump's net approval rating for cryptocurrency policies stands at +56 percentage points, surpassing other key issues, which have a net approval rating of +48 percentage points or lower.

data.title: Crypto Projects Raise $10.3 Billion in First Half of 2025
data.description: According to Odaily, the total funding for cryptocurrency projects in the first half of 2025 reached approximately $10.3 billion, surpassing the $9.6 billion raised throughout 2024. Among these projects, World Liberty Financial, supported by the Trump family, secured $300 million through a token sale on January 20, the day U.S. President Donald Trump was inaugurated. This achievement places it third among all fundraising projects.

data.title: A certain ancient giant whale has a 10,000 BTC address that has not been transferred and has been dormant for 14 years
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Yu Jin, an ancient whale transferred BTC that had been dormant for more than 14 years from 3 addresses today, with 10,000 BTC in each address. According to the associated address of the whale, another 10,000 BTC address that has not been transferred yet and has also been dormant for 14 years was found. In other words, this ancient whale now owns at least 40,000 BTC, worth up to 4.35 billion US dollars, and the current price has increased 66,000 times compared to that year.

data.title: Another address of an ancient whale holding 10,000 BTC was activated after 14.2 years of dormancy
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: According to Whale Alert monitoring, another Bitcoin address that has been dormant for 14.2 years has just been activated. The address contains 10,000 #Bitcoins (worth $1,087,349,293). In 2011, these bitcoins were worth only $34,016.

data.title: Oregon Attorney General Intends to Block Coinbase from Moving Securities Lawsuit to Federal Court
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News The Oregon Attorney General asked the federal court to dismiss Coinbase's motion to transfer the securities lawsuit to the federal court, insisting that the case should be heard in the state court. The lawsuit accuses Coinbase of promoting unregistered crypto securities to state residents and profiting from millions of dollars in fees. The core dispute in the case is that the "Pratt test" adopted by Oregon is broader than the federal "Howey test", and even if crypto assets do not meet the federal definition of securities, they may still be identified as state-level securities. Legal experts pointed out that if the state court's ruling is established, it may trigger a chain of enforcement against crypto companies by states based on local securities laws. (Decrypt)

data.title: Musk once again initiated a vote to propose the creation of the "American Party", with a current support rate of over 65%
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Musk launched a vote on the X platform, "Independence Day is the best time to ask if you want to get rid of the two-party system (some would say one-party system), should we create the American Party?" Currently, there are more than 46,000 votes, with a support rate of 65.6%. Musk previously said that if the "Beautiful Big Bill" is passed, a new American political party will be established the next day, and Trump's "Beautiful Big Bill" was passed by the House of Representatives this morning and will be signed at 5 a.m. on Saturday.

data.title: Ondo Finance to Acquire SEC-Regulated Broker Oasis Pro
data.description: According to Odaily, Ondo Finance is set to acquire Oasis Pro, a broker regulated by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC), to advance the tokenized stock market in the United States. The acquisition is pending regulatory approval, and the specific financial details of the transaction have not been disclosed. Upon completion, Ondo Finance will gain licenses to operate as a broker-dealer, alternative trading system (ATS), and digital securities transfer agent in the U.S.

data.title: Justin Sun Discusses Bitcoin's Potential to Challenge the Dollar
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Justin Sun has appeared on the cover of Asia Weekly after fourteen years and participated in an exclusive interview. During the discussion, Sun expressed his belief that Bitcoin has the potential to challenge the U.S. dollar's status as the global reserve currency within the next decade. He highlighted three core technologies that are expected to see significant advancement or adoption: stablecoins and cross-border payments, the integration of AI and blockchain, and cross-chain interoperability.

Previously, in 2011, Justin Sun was featured on the cover of Asia Weekly as a young entrepreneur and an early Bitcoin investor.

data.title: Bitrue Launches Tokenized Stock Trading for US Equities via xStocks
data.description:
Bitrue has announced support for tokenized stock trading via xStocks from Backed Finance, allowing users to invest in NVIDIA, Tesla, Apple, and more.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/bitrue-launches-tokenized-stock-trading-for-us-equities-via-xstocks/

data.title: Bank of Russia is not planning to buy Bitcoin, governor says
data.description:
The Bank of Russia is not considering investments in cryptocurrencies, its governor has indicated, despite Bitcoin reserves gaining popularity with monetary authorities around the world. Russia’s main financial regulator remains opposed to using decentralized digital money for payments, its head clarified, while leaving the door open to spending crypto in foreign trade. CBR not looking […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bank-of-russia-not-planning-to-buy-bitcoin/

source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/07/04/tokenized-real-world-assets-up-65-as-smart-money-pours-in/
